title: Environment, Shell State, Startup Files, and Sessions · Terminal Trace: Locale Timezone
summary: Repair a command that works interactively but fails in automation by tracing environment and startup differences instead of adding global hacks. Planned artifact: Add and verify the linux locale timezone increment in an environment-diff and startup-resolution notebook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Control locale, character encoding, collation, numeric formatting, and timezone when reproducibility depends on them.
Identify login, interactive, non-interactive, and remote shell startup paths before editing configuration.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# linux-basics cumulative operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic stateful terminal simulator.
# Record hypothesis, command, expected signal, observation, conclusion, and recovery.

steps.title: Predict Locale Timezone
steps.instruction:
